📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE PRINTING ALL RULES

1. Should the Chaos Event Have a Precursor Warning?

✔ Example: Should students get one class warning before the event happens, or should it happen suddenly?

2. Should Reroll Items Expire If Unused?

✔ If yes, it prevents stockpiling but may make players hesitant to use them.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 439 (chunk 439/555)
